heading: Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
label: 22706 Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
text: The corporation and its State, regional, and local subdivisions have the exclusive right to use the name “AMVETS (American Veterans)” and seals, emblems, and badges the corporation adopts.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2270636:67p., ; , , .July 23, 1947, ch. 298, § 1761 Stat. 408Pub. L. 95–98, § 1(a)91 Stat. 830Aug. 15, 1977The words “sole and” and “have and” are omitted as unnecessary. The word “adopts” is substituted for “may lawfully adopt” to eliminate unnecessary words.
Amendments2002— substituted “AMVETS (American Veterans)” for “AMVETS (American Veterans of World War II, Korea, and Vietnam)”.Pub. L. 107–241
